description_en: A course on data and scientific visualization covering techniques for creating effective visual representations of data.
competencies: Apply scientific and information visualization techniques
Design effective visual representations of data
Implement visualization pipelines and rendering methods
Evaluate and interpret visualizations critically

title_de: Statistische Planung und Auswertung von Versuchen
description_en: Course on statistical evaluation of experimental data, regression analysis and design of experiments for first- and second-order models.
competencies: Evaluate experimental production data with statistical methods
Perform regression and correlation analysis for linear and nonlinear models
Determine confidence intervals of model parameters
Set up factorial and central composite designs of experiments

description_en: Methodical engineering design covering the product development process, systems engineering, interdisciplinary information flows and team-based project work.
competencies: Apply systematic product development processes
Use systems engineering approaches across disciplines
Carry out methodical conceptual and detailed design
Manage interdisciplinary design projects in teams
Apply quality-oriented product development methods

description_en: Applied finite element analysis for product strength and structural simulation, covering meshing, material models, contact and structural dynamics.
competencies: Apply the finite element method to strength and structural analysis
Select appropriate meshing methods and material models
Evaluate simulation results and assess solution accuracy
Model contact problems and perform model reduction
Conduct eigenvalue, harmonic and transient structural dynamics analyses

description_en: Overview of CAx applications across the product lifecycle, covering CAD modeling, CAE simulation, optimization, and CAP/CAM process integration.
competencies: Apply CAx tools across the product lifecycle
Build 3D CAD models using B-Rep, CSG and parametric methods
Use CAE simulation including FEM, CFD and multibody systems
Apply topology and shape optimization techniques
Integrate CAP and CAM in the digital process chain

description_en: Management of CAx systems, covering system introduction and migration, economic efficiency assessment, lifecycle costing and technology evaluation.
competencies: Plan introduction and migration of CAx systems
Assess the economic efficiency of CAx systems
Apply cost methods to predict product costs across the lifecycle
Manage CAx systems and applications
Evaluate new technologies using the BAPM method

description_en: Introduction to data-driven and machine learning methods for the development, analysis and optimization of dynamic mechatronic systems.
competencies: Apply data-driven methods to dynamic mechatronic systems
Use supervised and unsupervised learning techniques
Build and apply perceptrons and neural networks
Apply data-driven control and reinforcement learning
Use physics-informed machine learning and assess its limitations

description_en: Design of working and conveying machines, focusing on deriving load assumptions and spectra and applying multibody simulation to size complex assemblies.
competencies: Determine load assumptions for working and conveying machines
Calculate forces and moments for drive and component sizing
Derive load spectra for dimensioning machine drive units
Design and conceptualize complex machine assemblies
Apply multibody simulation to size complex machines

description_en: Driver assistance systems and autonomous driving, covering vehicle dynamics, sensors and actuators, and stabilization- and navigation-level assistance functions.
competencies: Explain the structure and function of driver assistance systems
Apply development methodology for driver assistance systems
Model vehicle dynamics for assistance functions
Select sensors and actuators for assistance systems
Assess stabilization and navigation-level assistance systems

description_en: Energy sources and storage technologies for vehicles, covering fossil and biogenic fuels, hydrogen, kinetic and electrochemical storage, and battery management.
competencies: Select energy sources and storage technologies for applications
Assess fuels by availability, sustainability and economics
Explain electrochemical principles of primary and secondary cells
Evaluate kinetic and electrical energy storage systems
Apply battery management and scaling for mobile systems

description_en: Experimental mechanics linking theory and application through laboratory measurement of deformations, stresses and vibrations using strain gauges and photoelasticity.
competencies: Select appropriate experimental measurement methods independently
Measure deformations, stresses and vibrations in solids
Apply strain gauges, photoelasticity and frequency analysis
Acquire and process measurement data
Conduct experiments and correctly evaluate results

description_en: Planning and control of industrial production, covering organizational structures, order processing, ERP-based resource planning and production system evaluation.
competencies: Plan and control industrial production processes
Derive organizational structures from corporate strategy
Apply ERP-supported production planning methods
Plan resource deployment and material provision
Evaluate production systems using logistic key figures

description_en: Vehicle emissions covering emission types and effects, legal regulations, formation and reduction measures, and exhaust aftertreatment across powertrain concepts.
competencies: Analyse types of vehicle emissions and their effects
Distinguish emissions from immissions
Apply legal regulations on vehicle emissions
Evaluate emission formation and reduction measures
Compare emissions across vehicle and powertrain concepts

description_en: Vehicle system design covering the development process, platforms, requirements management, electrified and conventional architectures, and life-cycle assessment.
competencies: Analyse requirements in vehicle development
Design vehicle architectures and platforms
Apply the product development process to vehicles
Compare BEV, HEV, FCEV and conventional architectures
Consider recycling and life-cycle assessment in design

description_en: Manufacturing- and assembly-appropriate product design, covering design-for-manufacturing and design-for-assembly principles, recycling and conformity assessment.
competencies: Apply design-for-manufacturing principles
Apply design-for-assembly methods
Adapt component design to specific manufacturing processes
Address disassembly and recycling in design
Apply conformity assessment and CE marking procedures

description_en: Manufacturing metrology covering measurement setup design, instrument selection, geometric inspection, measurement uncertainty and statistical data analysis.
competencies: Design measurement setups from drawing specifications
Select appropriate measuring instruments and gauges
Apply measuring devices to inspect geometric elements
Assess measurement deviations and uncertainties
Statistically analyse and process measurement data
